pie_et_clear_generated_privilege_visibility = {
	pie_et_clear_generated_grant_privilege_visibility = yes
	pie_et_clear_generated_revoke_privilege_visibility = yes
}

	remove_variable = pie_et_sg_guild_investments
	remove_variable = pie_et_sr_guild_investments
}

pie_et_rebuild_generated_grant_privilege_visibility = {
	pie_et_clear_generated_grant_privilege_visibility = yes
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_estate_nobles
			country_has_estate = estate_type:nobles_estate
		}
		"estate(estate_type:nobles_estate)" = {
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:nobles_land_rights }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_pg_nobles_land_rights value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:auxilium_et_consilium }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_pg_auxilium_et_consilium value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:noble_serfdom_rights }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_pg_noble_serfdom_rights value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:noble_fortification_licenses }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_pg_noble_fortification_licenses value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:noble_marriage_rights }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_pg_noble_marriage_rights value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:banal_lordship }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_pg_banal_lordship value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:primacy_of_nobility }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_pg_primacy_of_nobility value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:noble_leaders_only }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_pg_noble_leaders_only value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:elaborate_court_ceremonies }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_pg_elaborate_court_ceremonies value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:nobles_protected_faith }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_pg_nobles_protected_faith value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:nobility_council }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_pg_nobility_council value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:manorial_courts }

pie_et_rebuild_generated_revoke_privilege_visibility = {
	pie_et_clear_generated_revoke_privilege_visibility = yes
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_estate_nobles
			country_has_estate = estate_type:nobles_estate
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:nobles_estate
				this = estate_privilege:nobles_land_rights
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_pr_nobles_land_rights value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:nobles_estate
				this = estate_privilege:auxilium_et_consilium
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_pr_auxilium_et_consilium value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {

			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_pr_clergy_in_administration value = yes } }
		}

			limit = {

}

pie_et_select_grant_privilege_nobles_land_rights = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_sg_nobles_land_rights }
		remove_variable = pie_et_sg_nobles_land_rights
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_pg_nobles_land_rights }
			remove_variable = pie_et_sr_nobles_land_rights
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_sg_nobles_land_rights value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_generated_selected_grant_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_grant_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
	pie_et_sync_generated_selected_privilege_term_flags = yes
}

pie_et_select_revoke_privilege_nobles_land_rights = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_sr_nobles_land_rights }
		remove_variable = pie_et_sr_nobles_land_rights
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_pr_nobles_land_rights }
			remove_variable = pie_et_sg_nobles_land_rights
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_sr_nobles_land_rights value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_generated_selected_revoke_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_reduce_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
	pie_et_sync_generated_selected_privilege_term_flags = yes
}

pie_et_select_grant_privilege_auxilium_et_consilium = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_sg_auxilium_et_consilium }
		remove_variable = pie_et_sg_auxilium_et_consilium
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_pg_auxilium_et_consilium }
			remove_variable = pie_et_sr_auxilium_et_consilium
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_sg_auxilium_et_consilium value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_generated_selected_grant_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_grant_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
	pie_et_sync_generated_selected_privilege_term_flags = yes
}

pie_et_select_revoke_privilege_auxilium_et_consilium = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_sr_auxilium_et_consilium }
		remove_variable = pie_et_sr_auxilium_et_consilium
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_pr_auxilium_et_consilium }
			remove_variable = pie_et_sg_auxilium_et_consilium
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_sr_auxilium_et_consilium value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_generated_selected_revoke_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_reduce_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
	pie_et_sync_generated_selected_privilege_term_flags = yes
}

pie_et_select_grant_privilege_noble_serfdom_rights = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_sg_noble_serfdom_rights }
		remove_variable = pie_et_sg_noble_serfdom_rights
	}
	else = {

			set_variable = { name = pie_et_generated_selected_grant_privilege value = yes }

			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_reduce_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
	pie_et_sync_generated_selected_privilege_term_flags = yes
}

pie_et_select_grant_privilege_feudal_mercenary_contracts = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_sg_feudal_mercenary_contracts }
		remove_variable = pie_et_sg_feudal_mercenary_contracts
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_pg_feudal_mercenary_contracts }
			remove_variable = pie_et_sr_feudal_mercenary_contracts
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_sg_feudal_mercenary_contracts value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_generated_selected_grant_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_grant_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
	pie_et_sync_generated_selected_privilege_term_flags = yes
}

		}
	}
	pie_et_sync_generated_selected_privilege_term_flags = yes
}

pie_et_select_grant_privilege_pacta_conventa = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_sg_pacta_conventa }
		remove_variable = pie_et_sg_pacta_conventa
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_pg_pacta_conventa }
			remove_variable = pie_et_sr_pacta_conventa
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_sg_pacta_conventa value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_generated_selected_grant_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_grant_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
	pie_et_sync_generated_selected_privilege_term_flags = yes
}

pie_et_select_revoke_privilege_pacta_conventa = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_sr_pacta_conventa }
		remove_variable = pie_et_sr_pacta_conventa
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_pr_pacta_conventa }
			remove_variable = pie_et_sg_pacta_conventa
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_sr_pacta_conventa value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_generated_selected_revoke_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_reduce_privilege value = yes }

pie_et_select_grant_privilege_vlastele_krayishnik = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_sg_vlastele_krayishnik }
		remove_variable = pie_et_sg_vlastele_krayishnik
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_pg_vlastele_krayishnik }
			remove_variable = pie_et_sr_vlastele_krayishnik
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_sg_vlastele_krayishnik value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_generated_selected_grant_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_grant_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
	pie_et_sync_generated_selected_privilege_term_flags = yes
}

	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_sg_avogadoria_de_comun }
		remove_variable = pie_et_sg_avogadoria_de_comun
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_pg_avogadoria_de_comun }
			remove_variable = pie_et_sr_avogadoria_de_comun
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_sg_avogadoria_de_comun value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_generated_selected_grant_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_grant_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
	pie_et_sync_generated_selected_privilege_term_flags = yes
}

pie_et_select_revoke_privilege_avogadoria_de_comun = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_sr_avogadoria_de_comun }
		remove_variable = pie_et_sr_avogadoria_de_comun
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_pr_avogadoria_de_comun }
			remove_variable = pie_et_sg_avogadoria_de_comun
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_sr_avogadoria_de_comun value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_generated_selected_revoke_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_reduce_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
	pie_et_sync_generated_selected_privilege_term_flags = yes
}

}

pie_et_select_grant_privilege_justicia_de_aragon = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_sg_justicia_de_aragon }
		remove_variable = pie_et_sg_justicia_de_aragon
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_pg_justicia_de_aragon }
			remove_variable = pie_et_sr_justicia_de_aragon
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_sg_justicia_de_aragon value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_generated_selected_grant_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_grant_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
	pie_et_sync_generated_selected_privilege_term_flags = yes
}

pie_et_select_revoke_privilege_justicia_de_aragon = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_sr_justicia_de_aragon }
		remove_variable = pie_et_sr_justicia_de_aragon
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_pr_justicia_de_aragon }
			remove_variable = pie_et_sg_justicia_de_aragon
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_sr_justicia_de_aragon value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_generated_selected_revoke_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_reduce_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
	pie_et_sync_generated_selected_privilege_term_flags = yes
}

pie_et_select_grant_privilege_formalized_oath = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_sg_formalized_oath }
		remove_variable = pie_et_sg_formalized_oath
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_pg_formalized_oath }
			remove_variable = pie_et_sr_formalized_oath
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_sg_formalized_oath value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_generated_selected_grant_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_grant_privilege value = yes }

			remove_variable = pie_et_sg_clergy_lecture_oaths
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_sr_clergy_lecture_oaths value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_generated_selected_revoke_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_reduce_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
	pie_et_sync_generated_selected_privilege_term_flags = yes
}

pie_et_select_grant_privilege_clergy_land_rights = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_sg_clergy_land_rights }
		remove_variable = pie_et_sg_clergy_land_rights
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_pg_clergy_land_rights }
			remove_variable = pie_et_sr_clergy_land_rights
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_sg_clergy_land_rights value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_generated_selected_grant_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_grant_privilege value = yes }
		}

			set_variable = { name = pie_et_generated_selected_revoke_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_reduce_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
	pie_et_sync_generated_selected_privilege_term_flags = yes
}

pie_et_select_grant_privilege_sponsor_printing_of_religious_texts = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_sg_sponsor_printing_of_religious_texts }
		remove_variable = pie_et_sg_sponsor_printing_of_religious_texts
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_pg_sponsor_printing_of_religious_texts }
			remove_variable = pie_et_sr_sponsor_printing_of_religious_texts
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_sg_sponsor_printing_of_religious_texts value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_generated_selected_grant_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_grant_privilege value = yes }
		}

			remove_variable = pie_et_sg_dharmic_dhimmi_communities
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_sr_dharmic_dhimmi_communities value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_generated_selected_revoke_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_reduce_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
	pie_et_sync_generated_selected_privilege_term_flags = yes
}

	pie_et_init_trade = yes

	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_sr_florence_guilds }
		remove_variable = pie_et_sr_florence_guilds
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_pr_florence_guilds }
			remove_variable = pie_et_sg_florence_guilds
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_sr_florence_guilds value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_generated_selected_revoke_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_reduce_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
	pie_et_sync_generated_selected_privilege_term_flags = yes
}

			remove_variable = pie_et_sg_toll_and_tariff_exemptions
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_sr_toll_and_tariff_exemptions value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_generated_selected_revoke_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_reduce_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
	pie_et_sync_generated_selected_privilege_term_flags = yes
}

pie_et_select_grant_privilege_dedicated_merchant_courts = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_sg_dedicated_merchant_courts }
		remove_variable = pie_et_sg_dedicated_merchant_courts
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_pg_dedicated_merchant_courts }
			remove_variable = pie_et_sr_dedicated_merchant_courts
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_sg_dedicated_merchant_courts value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_generated_selected_grant_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_grant_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
	pie_et_sync_generated_selected_privilege_term_flags = yes
}

			remove_variable = pie_et_sg_bra_kreditwerk_reformed
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_sr_bra_kreditwerk_reformed value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_generated_selected_revoke_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_reduce_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
	pie_et_sync_generated_selected_privilege_term_flags = yes
}

pie_et_select_grant_privilege_vij_tamil_trading_rights = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_sg_vij_tamil_trading_rights }
		remove_variable = pie_et_sg_vij_tamil_trading_rights
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_pg_vij_tamil_trading_rights }
			remove_variable = pie_et_sr_vij_tamil_trading_rights
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_sg_vij_tamil_trading_rights value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_generated_selected_grant_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_grant_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
	pie_et_sync_generated_selected_privilege_term_flags = yes

	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_sr_ira_iranian_art_patronage }
		remove_variable = pie_et_sr_ira_iranian_art_patronage
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_pr_ira_iranian_art_patronage }
			remove_variable = pie_et_sg_ira_iranian_art_patronage
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_sr_ira_iranian_art_patronage value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_generated_selected_revoke_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_reduce_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
	pie_et_sync_generated_selected_privilege_term_flags = yes
}

pie_et_select_grant_privilege_guild_investments = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_sg_guild_investments }
		remove_variable = pie_et_sg_guild_investments
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_pg_guild_investments }
			remove_variable = pie_et_sr_guild_investments
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_sg_guild_investments value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_generated_selected_grant_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_grant_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
	pie_et_sync_generated_selected_privilege_term_flags = yes
}

pie_et_select_revoke_privilege_guild_investments = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_sr_guild_investments }
		remove_variable = pie_et_sr_guild_investments
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_pr_guild_investments }
			remove_variable = pie_et_sg_guild_investments
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_sr_guild_investments value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_generated_selected_revoke_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_reduce_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
	pie_et_sync_generated_selected_privilege_term_flags = yes
}

pie_et_apply_generated_selected_privileges = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sg_nobles_land_rights
		}
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:nobles_land_rights
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sr_nobles_land_rights
		}
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:nobles_land_rights
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sg_auxilium_et_consilium
		}
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:auxilium_et_consilium
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sr_auxilium_et_consilium
		}

	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sg_noble_serfdom_rights

	}

			has_variable = pie_et_sr_noble_serfdom_rights
		}

	if = {

		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:vij_tamil_trading_rights
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sr_vij_tamil_trading_rights
		}
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:vij_tamil_trading_rights
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sg_jain_banking_rights
		}
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:jain_banking_rights
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sr_jain_banking_rights
		}
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:jain_banking_rights
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sg_jain_scholars
		}
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:jain_scholars
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sr_jain_scholars
		}
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:jain_scholars
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sg_consolidated_corruption_of_the_burghers
		}
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:consolidated_corruption_of_the_burghers
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sr_consolidated_corruption_of_the_burghers
		}
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:consolidated_corruption_of_the_burghers
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sg_magdeburg_rights
		}
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:magdeburg_rights
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sr_magdeburg_rights
		}
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:magdeburg_rights
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sg_novi_fori
		}
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:novi_fori
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sr_novi_fori
		}
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:novi_fori
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sg_shooting_societies
		}
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:shooting_societies
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sr_shooting_societies
		}
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:shooting_societies
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sg_building_roads_rights
		}
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:building_roads_rights
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sr_building_roads_rights
		}
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:building_roads_rights
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sg_kannada_literature_aid
		}
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:kannada_literature_aid
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sr_kannada_literature_aid
		}
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:kannada_literature_aid
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sg_vij_allowance_of_religious_practices
		}
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:vij_allowance_of_religious_practices
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sr_vij_allowance_of_religious_practices
		}
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:vij_allowance_of_religious_practices
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sg_mam_muhtasibs
		}
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:mam_muhtasibs
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sr_mam_muhtasibs
		}
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:mam_muhtasibs
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sg_trunk_road_to_erzurum_privilege
		}
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:trunk_road_to_erzurum_privilege
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sr_trunk_road_to_erzurum_privilege
		}
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:trunk_road_to_erzurum_privilege
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sg_cas_mita_system
		}
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:cas_mita_system
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sr_cas_mita_system
		}
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:cas_mita_system
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sg_royal_factories_privilege
		}
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:royal_factories_privilege
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sr_royal_factories_privilege
		}
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:royal_factories_privilege
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sg_ira_iranian_art_patronage
		}
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:ira_iranian_art_patronage
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sr_ira_iranian_art_patronage
		}
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:ira_iranian_art_patronage
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sg_guild_investments
		}
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:guild_investments
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_sr_guild_investments
		}
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:guild_investments
	}
}

pie_et_sync_generated_selected_privilege_term_flags = {
	if = {
		limit = { pie_et_generated_selected_privilege_is_valid = yes }
		pie_et_clear_generated_peasant_selected_privilege_terms = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_variable = pie_et_sg_nobles_land_rights
